prompt: A surreal landscape where dozens of small swirling vortices rise vibrantly upward in harmonious clusters, but their collective form merges into one massive downward vortex, impossible spatial contradiction, uncanny cohesion, vibrant colors in small forms fade to muted descent overall, no text, no numbers, highly detailed, surreal art by Zdzisław Beksiński Negative: charts, graphs, literal objects, text, symmetry
visual_logic: Micro-upward swirls in clusters reverse into macro-downward funnel, embodying local trends contradicting global aggregate.
